    if (savedByLineItem) {

      if (!widgetConfig?.storefront?.useOnlyAjaxToRemove && (savedByRemovedCount || 0) < 3) {

        // TODO -- do we need locale?
        if (!savedByLineItem) return;
        url.searchParams.append(`updates[${savedByLineItem.id}]`, '0');

        const savedByRemovedCount = +(localStorage.getItem('savedByRemovedCount') || 0);

        window.location.href = url.toString();
      } else {
        // USE AJAX TO REMOVE SAVEDBY FROM CART & RELOAD PAGE
        const body = {};
        if (savedByLineItem) body.updates = { [savedByLineItem.id]: 0 };
        // if ('_SavedBy-internal' in cart.attributes) body.attributes = { '_SavedBy-internal': null }; // TODO -- remove?

        fetch('/cart/update.js', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify(body),
        }).then(() => {
          const currentCount = +(localStorage.getItem('savedByRemovedCount') || 0);
          localStorage.setItem('savedByRemovedCount', currentCount + 1);

          if (currentCount < 2) window.location.reload();
        });
      }

        });
      }

        type: "module",
        async: true,
        src: assetUrl.replace('VERSION', _SavedBy_sfwVersion),

      })
      document.head.appendChild(script);
    });

    function safeIdleCallback(cb, timeout = 2000) {
      let called = false;

      const invoke = () => {
        if (called) return;
        called = true;
        cb();
      };

      if ('requestIdleCallback' in window) {
        window.requestIdleCallback(invoke);
      } else {
        // Fallback if not supported (Safari, etc.)
        setTimeout(() => {
          invoke();
        }, 1);
      }

      // Guarantee execution even if idle never comes
      setTimeout(() => {
        invoke();
      }, timeout);
    }
  })();

const SHIPPING_FEE = 600;
const FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD = 6000;

const formatCurrency = (number) => {
	const locale = typeof Shopify !== "undefined" && Shopify.locale ? Shopify.locale : "en";
	const currency = typeof Shopify !== "undefined" && Shopify.currency && Shopify.currency.active ? Shopify.currency.active : "USD";
	const amount = Number(number);

	if (isNaN(amount)) return null;

	return new Intl.NumberFormat(locale, {
		style: "currency",
		currency,
		currencyDisplay: "symbol",
	}).format(amount);
};

SavedBy.checkoutText = (text) => {
	const { total_price = 0, items_subtotal_price = 0 } = SavedBy.cart || {};
	const fee = SavedBy.fee || 0;

	if (items_subtotal_price >= FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD) return text;

	const totalCents = total_price + fee + SHIPPING_FEE;
	const totalWithShipping = formatCurrency(totalCents / 100);

	if (window.location.pathname !== "/cart") {
		return totalWithShipping ? `CHECKOUT+ • ${totalWithShipping}` : text;

  .announcement-pause-btn svg {

  .announcement-pause-btn .icon-play {
    display: none;
  }

  .announcement-pause-btn[aria-pressed="true"] .icon-pause {

  }

  .announcement-pause-btn[aria-pressed="true"] .icon-play {

  }

  /* High contrast mode */

<script>
  let pageSlug = window.location.pathname;
  
  if (pageSlug.includes('loyalty-rewards') || pageSlug.includes('giftcard') || pageSlug.includes('military-discount')) {
    document.querySelector('.announcement-bar').classList.add('black');
    document.querySelector('.announcement-bar').classList.remove('orange');
  } else {
    document.querySelector('.announcement-bar').classList.add('orange');
    document.querySelector('.announcement-bar').classList.remove('black');
  }

  // Announcement bar pause button functionality
  (function() {
    function initAnnouncementPause() {
      var pauseButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.js-announcement-pause');
      
      pauseButtons.forEach(function(btn) {
        if (btn.hasAttribute('data-initialized')) return;
        btn.setAttribute('data-initialized', 'true');
        
        var slideshowComponent = btn.closest('slideshow-component');
        
        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
          var isPaused = btn.getAttribute('aria-pressed') === 'true';
          
          if (isPaused) {
            // Resume autoplay
            btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');
            if (slideshowComponent && typeof slideshowComponent.play === 'function') {
              slideshowComponent.play();
              // Set flag so it doesn't pause on focusout
              slideshowComponent.announcementBarArrowButtonWasClicked = false;
            }
            announceState('Announcements auto-play resumed');
            console.log('[Announcement Pause] Resumed');
          } else {
            // Pause autoplay
            btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
            if (slideshowComponent && typeof slideshowComponent.pause === 'function') {
              slideshowComponent.pause();
              // Set flag so it stays paused
              slideshowComponent.announcementBarArrowButtonWasClicked = true;
            }
            announceState('Announcements paused');
            console.log('[Announcement Pause] Paused');
          }
        });

        // Handle keyboard events explicitly for accessibility
        btn.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
          if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
            e.preventDefault();
            btn.click();
          }
        });
      });
    }
    
    function announceState(message) {
      var announcer = document.getElementById('announcement-pause-announcer');
      
      if (!announcer) {
        announcer = document.createElement('div');
        announcer.id = 'announcement-pause-announcer';
        announcer.setAttribute('role', 'status');
        announcer.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
        announcer.setAttribute('aria-atomic', 'true');
        announcer.className = 'visually-hidden';
        document.body.appendChild(announcer);
      }
      
      announcer.textContent = '';
      setTimeout(function() {
        announcer.textContent = message;
      }, 100);
    }
    
    // Auto-pause for reduced motion preference
    function checkReducedMotion() {
      if (window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.js-announcement-pause').forEach(function(btn) {
          var slideshowComponent = btn.closest('slideshow-component');
          btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
          if (slideshowComponent && typeof slideshowComponent.pause === 'function') {
            slideshowComponent.pause();
            slideshowComponent.announcementBarArrowButtonWasClicked = true;
          }
        });
      }
    }
    
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        initAnnouncementPause();
        // Small delay to ensure slideshow component is initialized
        setTimeout(checkReducedMotion, 100);
      });
    } else {
      initAnnouncementPause();
      setTimeout(checkReducedMotion, 100);
    }
  })();
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const megaMenuButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.znt-mega-menu-button');
  const megaMenus = document.querySelectorAll('.znt-mega-menu');
  const submenuButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.mega-menu__link--level-2');
  
  // Handle main mega menu buttons
  megaMenuButtons.forEach(button => {
    const megaMenu = button.closest('.znt-mega-menu');
    const megaMenuPanel = megaMenu.querySelector('.znt-mega-menu-panel');
    
    // Toggle mega menu on button click
    button.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      
      const isExpanded = button.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
      
      // Close all other mega menus first
      megaMenuButtons.forEach(otherButton => {
        if (otherButton !== button) {
          otherButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
          otherButton.closest('.znt-mega-menu').removeAttribute('open');
        }
      });
      
      // Toggle current mega menu
      if (isExpanded) {
        button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        megaMenu.removeAttribute('open');
      } else {
        button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
        megaMenu.setAttribute('open', '');
        // Focus the first focusable element in the mega menu panel
        const firstFocusable = megaMenuPanel.querySelector('a, button, input, select, textarea, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
        if (firstFocusable) {
          firstFocusable.focus();
        }
      }
    });
    
    // Handle ESC key
    megaMenuPanel.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        megaMenu.removeAttribute('open');
        button.focus();
      }
    });
    
    // Handle focus out
    megaMenu.addEventListener('focusout', function(e) {
      // Use setTimeout to check if focus moved outside the mega menu
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (!megaMenu.contains(document.activeElement)) {
          button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
          megaMenu.removeAttribute('open');
        }
      }, 10);
    });
  });
  
  // Handle submenu buttons
  submenuButtons.forEach(button => {
    const submenu = document.getElementById(button.getAttribute('aria-controls'));
    
    if (submenu) {
      // Toggle submenu on button click
      button.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        
        const isExpanded = button.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
        
        // Close all other submenus first
        submenuButtons.forEach(otherButton => {
          if (otherButton !== button) {
            otherButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            const otherSubmenu = document.getElementById(otherButton.getAttribute('aria-controls'));
            if (otherSubmenu) {
              otherSubmenu.classList.add('d-none');
            }
          }
        });
        
        // Toggle current submenu
        if (isExpanded) {
          button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
          submenu.classList.add('d-none');
        } else {
          button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
          submenu.classList.remove('d-none');
        }
      });
      
      // Handle ESC key for submenu
      submenu.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') {
          button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
          submenu.classList.add('d-none');
          button.focus();
        }
      });
      
      // Handle focus out for submenu
      submenu.addEventListener('focusout', function(e) {
        // Use setTimeout to check if focus moved outside the submenu
        setTimeout(() => {
          if (!submenu.contains(document.activeElement)) {
            button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            submenu.classList.add('d-none');
          }
        }, 10);
      });
    }
  });
  
  // Close mega menus when clicking outside
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (!e.target.closest('.znt-mega-menu')) {
      megaMenuButtons.forEach(button => {
        button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        button.closest('.znt-mega-menu').removeAttribute('open');
      });
      
      // Also close all submenus
      submenuButtons.forEach(button => {
        button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        const submenu = document.getElementById(button.getAttribute('aria-controls'));
        if (submenu) {
          submenu.classList.add('d-none');
        }
      });
    }
  });
});
</script>

    opacity: 1 !important;
  }

  /* Klaviyo SR-only label (Email) – keep black on white for focus/accessibility when visible */
  .high-contrast-mode .footer .newsletter-form label.klaviyo-sr-only,
  .high-contrast-mode .footer .newsletter-form label[id^="label-email"],
  .high-contrast-mode .footer .newsletter-form .needsclick label {
    color: #000000 !important;
    background-color: #ffffff !important;
    background: #ffffff !important;
  }

  /* Legal links – Privacy Choices icon visible on dark background */
  .high-contrast-mode .legal-links a img {
    filter: brightness(0) invert(1);
    opacity: 1;
  }

  /* Override any orange text color */
  .high-contrast-mode [style*="color: rgb(255, 71, 19)"],
  .high-contrast-mode [style*="color:#ff4713"],
  .high-contrast-mode [style*="color: #ff4713"] {
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  /* Override any orange border color */
  .high-contrast-mode [style*="border-color: rgb(255, 71, 19)"],
  .high-contrast-mode [style*="border-color:#ff4713"],
  .high-contrast-mode [style*="border-color: #ff4713"] {
    border-color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  /* Elements marked by JS with orange text */
  .high-contrast-mode [data-hc-original-color] {
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  /* Elements marked by JS with orange border */
  .high-contrast-mode [data-hc-original-border] {
    border-color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  /* SVG elements marked by JS with orange fill */
  .high-contrast-mode [data-hc-original-fill] {
    fill: #ffffff !important;
  }

  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card,
  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card *,
  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card_top,
  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card_top *,
  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card_bottom,
  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card_bottom h2,
  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card .small-text,
  .high-contrast-mode .routing-card .small-text * {
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }
</style>

<script>
  // Only run this script once (guard against multiple includes)
  if (!window._POTHighContrastInitialized) {
    window._POTHighContrastInitialized = true;
    
    (function() {
      'use strict';
      
      var STORAGE_KEY = 'pot-high-contrast-mode';
      var BODY_CLASS = 'high-contrast-mode';
      var URL_PARAMS = ['high-contrast', 'hc', 'highcontrast', 'contrast'];
      
      // Orange color values to detect (the brand orange #ff4713)
      var ORANGE_COLORS = [
        'rgb(255, 71, 19)',
        'rgb(255,71,19)',
        '#ff4713',
        '#FF4713',
        'rgba(255, 71, 19',
        'rgba(255,71,19'
      ];
      
      console.log('[High Contrast] Script loaded');
      
      /**
       * Check if a color string matches the orange brand color
       */
      function isOrangeColor(colorStr) {
        if (!colorStr) return false;
        var normalized = colorStr.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g, '');
        return ORANGE_COLORS.some(function(orange) {
          return normalized.indexOf(orange.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g, '')) !== -1;
        });
      }
      
      /**
       * Find and mark all elements with orange colors (background, text, border, SVG fill)
       */
      function markOrangeElements() {
        var allElements = document.querySelectorAll('*');
        var count = 0;
        
        allElements.forEach(function(el) {
          try {
            // Skip mega menu elements - they should maintain their original colors
            if (el.closest('.mega-menu__content') || 
                el.closest('.mega-menu__list') || 
                el.closest('.mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__content') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__list') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__link') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
                el.closest('.znt-mega-menu-panel')) {
              return; // Skip this element
            }
            // Skip footer – footer uses CSS-only high-contrast rules so it reverts cleanly when toggle is off
            if (el.closest('footer.footer') || el.closest('.shopify-section-footer')) {
              return;
            }
            
            var inlineStyle = el.getAttribute('style') || '';
            var computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(el);
            var bgColor = computedStyle.backgroundColor;
            var textColor = computedStyle.color;
            var borderColor = computedStyle.borderColor;
            
            // Check background color
            if (isOrangeColor(inlineStyle) || isOrangeColor(bgColor)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-bg')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-bg', bgColor || inlineStyle);
                count++;
              }
            }
            
            // Check text color
            if (isOrangeColor(textColor)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-color')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-color', textColor);
                count++;
              }
            }
            
            // Check border color
            if (isOrangeColor(borderColor)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-border')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-border', borderColor);
                count++;
              }
            }
          } catch (e) {}
        });
        
        // Also mark SVG elements with orange fill (skip footer – footer icons use CSS-only rules)
        var svgElements = document.querySelectorAll('svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon');
        svgElements.forEach(function(el) {
          try {
            if (el.closest('footer.footer') || el.closest('.shopify-section-footer')) return;
            var fill = el.getAttribute('fill') || '';
            if (isOrangeColor(fill)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-fill')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-fill', fill);
                count++;
              }
            }
          } catch (e) {}
        });
        
        if (count > 0) {
          console.log('[High Contrast] Marked ' + count + ' orange elements');
        }
      }
      
      /**
       * Check URL parameters for high contrast flag
       */
      function checkURLParams() {
        try {
          var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
          
          for (var i = 0; i < URL_PARAMS.length; i++) {
            var param = URL_PARAMS[i];
            var value = urlParams.get(param);
            if (value === 'true' || value === '1' || value === 'on' || value === '') {
              console.log('[High Contrast] URL parameter detected: ' + param);
              return true;
            }
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.log('[High Contrast] Error checking URL params:', e);
        }
        return false;
      }
      
      /**
       * Remove any inline styles from mega menu elements
       * This ensures mega menu maintains its original appearance
       */
      function cleanMegaMenuStyles() {
        var megaMenuSelectors = [
          '.mega-menu__content',
          '.mega-menu__list',
          '.mega-menu__link',
          '.mega-menu__sub-menu',
          '.znt-mega-menu-panel',
          '.znt-submenu-button'
        ];
        
        megaMenuSelectors.forEach(function(selector) {
          document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(function(el) {
            // Remove inline style properties that might be set by high contrast
            el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
            el.style.removeProperty('background');
            el.style.removeProperty('color');
            el.style.removeProperty('border-color');
            el.style.removeProperty('border');
            // Also remove from all children
            el.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(function(child) {
              child.style.removeProperty('background-color');
              child.style.removeProperty('background');
              child.style.removeProperty('color');
              child.style.removeProperty('border-color');
              child.style.removeProperty('border');
            });
          });
        });
        
        // Remove data attributes from mega menu elements
        document.querySelectorAll('.mega-menu__content [data-hc-original-bg], .mega-menu__content [data-hc-original-color], .mega-menu__content [data-hc-original-border]').forEach(function(el) {
          el.removeAttribute('data-hc-original-bg');
          el.removeAttribute('data-hc-original-color');
          el.removeAttribute('data-hc-original-border');
        });
      }
      
      /**
       * Enable high contrast mode
       */
      function enableHighContrast() {
        console.log('[High Contrast] Enabling...');
        
        document.documentElement.classList.add(BODY_CLASS);
        if (document.body) {
          document.body.classList.add(BODY_CLASS);
        }
        
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, 'true');
        } catch (e) {}
        
        // Mark orange elements
        markOrangeElements();
        
        // Directly modify inline styles for elements with orange backgrounds
        applyHighContrastStyles();
        
        // Clean up any styles that might have been applied to mega menu
        cleanMegaMenuStyles();
        
        // Fix Klaviyo forms
        fixKlaviyoForms();
        
        // Start observing Klaviyo forms for style changes
        setTimeout(observeKlaviyoForms, 500);
        setTimeout(observeKlaviyoForms, 1500);
        
        // Update all toggles on page
        document.querySelectorAll('.js-high-contrast-toggle').forEach(function(t) {
          t.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
        });
        
        // Announce to screen readers
        announceToScreenReader('High contrast mode enabled');
        
        console.log('[High Contrast] Mode ENABLED');
      }
      
      /**
       * Apply high contrast inline styles to marked elements
       */
      function applyHighContrastStyles() {

        // About Us hero - remove background image and use black background
        // This adds inline styles which override <style> tag rules
          document.querySelectorAll('.about-us-hero-container').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.setProperty('background-image', 'none', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#000000', 'important');
        });

        // PDP Add to Cart button - white text
        document.querySelectorAll(".pot_addToCart_button, .product-form__submit, [id^=ProductSubmitButton]").forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.setProperty("background-color", "#000000", "important");
          el.style.setProperty("background", "#000000", "important");
          el.style.setProperty("color", "#ffffff", "important");
          el.style.setProperty("border-color", "#000000", "important");
          var span = el.querySelector("span");
          if (span) {
            span.style.setProperty("color", "#ffffff", "important");
          }
        });

        // Empty cart button - apply inline styles to override any dynamic changes
        document.querySelectorAll('.button_empty_cart').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background', '#000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('color', '#ffffff', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');          el.style.setProperty('text-decoration', 'none', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background', '#000000', 'important');
        });
        // For quick-add buttons: DO NOT set background on the button itself!
        // The button has width:100% but the visual comes from the :after pseudo-element (154px)
        // Setting background on the button makes the full-width button visible
        // Only set CSS custom properties and text color - CSS handles the :after background
        document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add__submit').forEach(function(el) {
          // Only set custom properties that CSS uses for the :after pseudo-element
          el.style.setProperty('--color-button', '0, 0, 0', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('--color-button-text', '255, 255, 255', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('--alpha-button-background', '1', 'important');
          // Make sure text is white
          el.style.setProperty('color', '#ffffff', 'important');
          
          // Also style the span inside (the ADD TO CART text)
          var span = el.querySelector('span:not(.icon-wrap):not(.loading__spinner)');
          if (span) {
            span.style.setProperty('background-color', '#000000', 'important');
            span.style.setProperty('color', '#ffffff', 'important');
          }
        });
        
        // Force Klaviyo/subscribe buttons to white background with black text (include footer #sign-up)
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] button, .klaviyo-form button, button.needsclick, button.go4187531934, #sign-up button, .newsletter-form button').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('border-color', '#000000', 'important');
        });
        
        // Force Klaviyo form inputs to white background with black text (include footer #sign-up)
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] input, [data-testid="form-row"] input, .klaviyo-form input, input.needsclick, input[id^="email_"], #sign-up input, .newsletter-form input').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('border-color', '#000000', 'important');
        });
        
        // Force Klaviyo form labels to black text with white background (footer #sign-up; visible label stays white via CSS)
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] label, .klaviyo-form label, label.needsclick, label.klaviyo-sr-only, label[id^="label-email"], label[id^="label-"]').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
        });
        

        
        // Convert orange background elements to black
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-bg]').forEach(function(el) {
          // Skip mega menu elements - they should maintain their original colors
          if (el.closest('.mega-menu__content') || 
              el.closest('.mega-menu__list') || 
              el.closest('.mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__content') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__list') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__link') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
              el.closest('.znt-mega-menu-panel')) {
            return; // Skip this element
          }
          
          // Skip Klaviyo/subscribe buttons - they should be white
          if (el.classList.contains('needsclick') || el.closest('[data-testid="form-component"]') || el.closest('.klaviyo-form')) {
            el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');
            return;
          }
          
          el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#000000', 'important');
          el.style.setProperty('background', '#000000', 'important');
          
          // If it's a button or link, also set text to white
          if (el.tagName === 'BUTTON' || el.tagName === 'A' || el.classList.contains('button') || el.classList.contains('quick-add__submit')) {
            el.style.setProperty('color', '#ffffff', 'important');
            // For quick-add buttons, keep border none; for others, set border color
            if (el.classList.contains('quick-add__submit')) {
              el.style.setProperty('border', 'none', 'important');
              el.style.setProperty('box-shadow', 'none', 'important');
            } else {
              el.style.setProperty('border-color', '#000000', 'important');
            }
          }
        });
        
        // Convert orange text to white
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-color]').forEach(function(el) {
          // Skip mega menu elements
          if (el.closest('.mega-menu__content') || 
              el.closest('.mega-menu__list') || 
              el.closest('.mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__content') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__list') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__link') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
              el.closest('.znt-mega-menu-panel')) {
            return; // Skip this element
          }
          el.style.setProperty('color', '#ffffff', 'important');
        });
        
        // Convert orange borders to white
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-border]').forEach(function(el) {
          // Skip mega menu elements
          if (el.closest('.mega-menu__content') || 
              el.closest('.mega-menu__list') || 
              el.closest('.mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__content') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__list') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__link') ||
              el.classList.contains('mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
              el.closest('.znt-mega-menu-panel')) {
            return; // Skip this element
          }
          el.style.setProperty('border-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
        });
        
        // Convert orange SVG fills to white
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-fill]').forEach(function(el) {
          el.setAttribute('fill', '#ffffff');
        });
        
        console.log('[High Contrast] Applied inline styles to marked elements');
      }
      
      /**
       * Remove high contrast inline styles from marked elements
       */
      function removeHighContrastStyles() {
console.log('removeHighContrastStyles');
        // Restore About Us hero - remove inline styles so <style> tag takes over
          document.querySelectorAll('.about-us-hero-container').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('background-image');
          el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
          el.style.removeProperty('background');
        });
        console.log('removeHighContrastStyles 2');
        // Remove styles from quick-add buttons
        // Note: We only set custom properties and color, NOT background
        document.querySelectorAll('.quick-add__submit').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('color');
          el.style.removeProperty('--color-button');
          el.style.removeProperty('--color-button-text');
          el.style.removeProperty('--alpha-button-background');
          
          var span = el.querySelector('span:not(.icon-wrap):not(.loading__spinner)');
          if (span) {
            span.style.removeProperty('color');
            span.style.removeProperty('background-color');
          }
        });
        
        // Remove styles from Klaviyo/subscribe buttons (include Klaviyo class so footer SUBSCRIBE reverts)
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] button, .klaviyo-form button, button.needsclick, button.go4187531934, #sign-up button, .newsletter-form button').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
          el.style.removeProperty('background');
          el.style.removeProperty('color');
          el.style.removeProperty('border');
          el.style.removeProperty('border-color');
        });
        
        // Remove styles from Klaviyo/subscribe inputs (footer #sign-up so toggle off reverts)
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] input, [data-testid="form-row"] input, .klaviyo-form input, input.needsclick, input[id^="email_"], #sign-up input, .newsletter-form input').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
          el.style.removeProperty('background');
          el.style.removeProperty('color');
          el.style.removeProperty('border');
          el.style.removeProperty('border-color');
        });
        
        // Remove styles from Klaviyo/subscribe labels (footer #sign-up so toggle off reverts)
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] label, .klaviyo-form label, label.needsclick, label.klaviyo-sr-only, label[id^="label-email"], label[id^="label-"], #sign-up label, .newsletter-form label').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
          el.style.removeProperty('background');
          el.style.removeProperty('color');
        });
        
        // Remove styles from footer elements so section-footer.css takes over again
        var footerSelectors = [
          '.footer',
          '.footer *',
          '.footer-top_left',
          '.footer-top_left *',
          '.footer-content',
          '.footer-content *',
          '.footer-nav',
          '.footer-nav *',
          '.footer-bottom',
          '.footer-bottom *',
          '.legal-links',
          '.legal-links *',
          '.newsletter-form',
          '.newsletter-form *',
          '.pot-footer',
          '.pot-footer *',
          '.footer__list-social',
          '.footer__list-social *',
          '.list-social',
          '.list-social *'
        ];
        footerSelectors.forEach(function(selector) {
          try {
            document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(function(el) {
              el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
              el.style.removeProperty('background');
              el.style.removeProperty('color');
              el.style.removeProperty('border');
              el.style.removeProperty('border-color');
              el.style.removeProperty('fill');
              el.style.removeProperty('filter');
            });
          } catch (e) {}
        });
        
        // Remove styles from PDP Add to Cart button
        document.querySelectorAll(".pot_addToCart_button, .product-form__submit, [id^=ProductSubmitButton]").forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty("background-color");
          el.style.removeProperty("background");
          el.style.removeProperty("color");
          el.style.removeProperty("border-color");
          var span = el.querySelector("span");
          if (span) {
            span.style.removeProperty("color");
          }
        });

        // Remove styles from empty cart button
        document.querySelectorAll('.button_empty_cart').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
          el.style.removeProperty('background');
          el.style.removeProperty('color');
          el.style.removeProperty('border');          el.style.removeProperty('text-decoration');
        });
        
        // Restore original background colors
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-bg]').forEach(function(el) {
          var original = el.getAttribute('data-hc-original-bg');
          el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
          el.style.removeProperty('background');
          el.style.removeProperty('color');
          el.style.removeProperty('border-color');
          el.style.removeProperty('border');
        });
        
        // Restore original text colors
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-color]').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('color');
        });
        
        // Restore original border colors
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-border]').forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.removeProperty('border-color');
        });
        
        // Restore original SVG fills
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-hc-original-fill]').forEach(function(el) {
          var original = el.getAttribute('data-hc-original-fill');
          el.setAttribute('fill', original);
        });
        
        console.log('[High Contrast] Removed inline styles from marked elements');
      }
      
      /**
       * Disable high contrast mode
       */
      function disableHighContrast() {
        console.log('[High Contrast] Disabling...');
        
        // Remove inline styles before removing class
        removeHighContrastStyles();
        
        document.documentElement.classList.remove(BODY_CLASS);
        if (document.body) {
          document.body.classList.remove(BODY_CLASS);
        }
        
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, 'false');
        } catch (e) {}
        
        // Update all toggles on page
        document.querySelectorAll('.js-high-contrast-toggle').forEach(function(t) {
          t.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');
        });
        
        // Announce to screen readers
        announceToScreenReader('High contrast mode disabled');
        
        console.log('[High Contrast] Mode DISABLED');
      }
      
      /**
       * Toggle high contrast mode
       */
      function toggleHighContrast() {
        var isEnabled = document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS);
        console.log('[High Contrast] Toggle clicked, currently enabled:', isEnabled);
        
        if (isEnabled) {
          disableHighContrast();
        } else {
          enableHighContrast();
        }
      }
      
      /**
       * Announce message to screen readers using live region
       */
      function announceToScreenReader(message) {
        var announcer = document.getElementById('high-contrast-announcer');
        
        if (!announcer) {
          announcer = document.createElement('div');
          announcer.id = 'high-contrast-announcer';
          announcer.setAttribute('role', 'status');
          announcer.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
          announcer.setAttribute('aria-atomic', 'true');
          announcer.className = 'visually-hidden';
          document.body.appendChild(announcer);
        }
        
        announcer.textContent = '';
        setTimeout(function() {
          announcer.textContent = message;
        }, 100);
      }
      
      /**
       * Attach click handlers to toggle buttons
       */
      function attachHandlers() {
        var toggles = document.querySelectorAll('.js-high-contrast-toggle');
        console.log('[High Contrast] Found ' + toggles.length + ' toggle button(s)');
        
        toggles.forEach(function(toggle) {
          // Remove any existing listener to prevent duplicates
          toggle.removeEventListener('click', toggleHighContrast);
          // Add click handler
          toggle.addEventListener('click', toggleHighContrast);
          console.log('[High Contrast] Click handler attached to button');
        });
      }
      
      /**
       * Initialize high contrast toggle functionality
       */
      function initHighContrastToggle() {
        console.log('[High Contrast] Initializing...');
        
        // Check for URL parameter override
        var urlForceEnabled = checkURLParams();
        
        // Check for saved preference
        var savedPreference = null;
        try {
          savedPreference = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
        } catch (e) {}
        
        var prefersHighContrast = false;
        try {
          prefersHighContrast = window.matchMedia('(prefers-contrast: more)').matches;
        } catch (e) {}
        
        console.log('[High Contrast] URL enabled:', urlForceEnabled);
        console.log('[High Contrast] Saved preference:', savedPreference);
        console.log('[High Contrast] System prefers:', prefersHighContrast);
        
        // Determine if should be enabled
        var shouldEnable = urlForceEnabled || 
                            savedPreference === 'true' || 
                            (savedPreference === null && prefersHighContrast);
        
        // Apply if needed
        if (shouldEnable) {
          enableHighContrast();
        }
        
        // Attach click handlers
        attachHandlers();
        
        /**
         * Fix Klaviyo form styles - forces black text on white background
         */
        function fixKlaviyoForms() {
          // Force Klaviyo form inputs to white background with black text
          document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] input, [data-testid="form-row"] input, .klaviyo-form input, input.needsclick, input[id^="email_"]').forEach(function(el) {
            el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('border-color', '#000000', 'important');
          });
          
          // Force Klaviyo form labels to black text with white background
          document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] label, .klaviyo-form label, label.needsclick, label.klaviyo-sr-only, label[id^="label-email"], label[id^="label-"]').forEach(function(el) {
            el.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
            el.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
          });
        }
        
        // Run marking after delays to catch dynamically loaded content
        setTimeout(function() {
          if (document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
            markOrangeElements();
            applyHighContrastStyles();
            cleanMegaMenuStyles();
            fixKlaviyoForms();
          }
        }, 500);
        
        setTimeout(function() {
          if (document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
            markOrangeElements();
            applyHighContrastStyles();
            cleanMegaMenuStyles();
            fixKlaviyoForms();
          }
        }, 2000);
        
        // Additional check for Klaviyo forms that load even later
        setTimeout(function() {
          if (document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
            fixKlaviyoForms();
          }
        }, 3000);
        
        // Keep checking for Klaviyo forms every 2 seconds for 30 seconds
        var klaviyoCheckInterval = setInterval(function() {
          if (document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
            fixKlaviyoForms();
            // Re-observe any new forms
            observeKlaviyoForms();
          }
        }, 2000);
        
        // Stop checking after 30 seconds
        setTimeout(function() {
          clearInterval(klaviyoCheckInterval);
        }, 30000);
        
        // Set up a focused observer for the first 15 seconds when Klaviyo is most likely to update
        // This catches Klaviyo style updates during initial load
        var aggressiveKlaviyoCheck = null;
        var consecutiveNoChangeCount = 0;
        var maxConsecutiveNoChange = 6; // Stop if no changes detected for 3 seconds (6 checks * 500ms)
        
        function startAggressiveCheck() {
          if (aggressiveKlaviyoCheck) return; // Already running
          
          aggressiveKlaviyoCheck = setInterval(function() {
            if (!document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
              return;
            }
            
            var foundChanges = false;
            var klaviyoInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[id^="email_"], [data-testid="form-component"] input[type="email"], [data-testid="form-row"] input[type="email"], .klaviyo-form input[type="email"], input.needsclick[type="email"]');
            klaviyoInputs.forEach(function(input) {
              var inlineStyle = input.getAttribute('style') || '';
              // Check if inline style has white color - if so, force it to black
              if (inlineStyle.indexOf('color: rgb(255, 255, 255)') !== -1 ||
                  inlineStyle.indexOf('color:#ffffff') !== -1 ||
                  inlineStyle.indexOf('color: #ffffff') !== -1 ||
                  inlineStyle.indexOf('color:rgb(255, 255, 255)') !== -1) {
                foundChanges = true;
                // Klaviyo set white color in inline style - override it
                input.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
                input.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
                input.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
                input.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');
                input.style.setProperty('border-color', '#000000', 'important');
              }
            });
            
            var klaviyoLabels = document.querySelectorAll('label[id^="label-email"], [data-testid="form-component"] label, .klaviyo-form label, label.needsclick, label.klaviyo-sr-only');
            klaviyoLabels.forEach(function(label) {
              var inlineStyle = label.getAttribute('style') || '';
              // Check if inline style has white color - if so, force it to black
              if (inlineStyle.indexOf('color: rgb(255, 255, 255)') !== -1 ||
                  inlineStyle.indexOf('color:#ffffff') !== -1 ||
                  inlineStyle.indexOf('color: #ffffff') !== -1 ||
                  inlineStyle.indexOf('color:rgb(255, 255, 255)') !== -1) {
                foundChanges = true;
                // Klaviyo set white color in inline style - override it
                label.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
                label.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
                label.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
              }
            });
            
            // If we found changes, reset the counter; otherwise increment it
            if (foundChanges) {
              consecutiveNoChangeCount = 0;
            } else {
              consecutiveNoChangeCount++;
              // If no changes detected for 3 seconds, stop the aggressive check
              // MutationObserver will handle any future changes
              if (consecutiveNoChangeCount >= maxConsecutiveNoChange) {
                clearInterval(aggressiveKlaviyoCheck);
                aggressiveKlaviyoCheck = null;
                console.log('[High Contrast] Stopped aggressive Klaviyo check - no changes detected');
              }
            }
          }, 500);
        }
        
        // Start aggressive checking for initial load period
        if (document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
          startAggressiveCheck();
        }
        
        // Also stop after 15 seconds as a safety net (Klaviyo should be done loading by then)
        setTimeout(function() {
          if (aggressiveKlaviyoCheck) {
            clearInterval(aggressiveKlaviyoCheck);
            aggressiveKlaviyoCheck = null;
            console.log('[High Contrast] Stopped aggressive Klaviyo check - time limit reached');
          }
        }, 15000);
        
        // Listen for system preference changes
        try {
          window.matchMedia('(prefers-contrast: more)').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
            var saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
            if (saved === null) {
              if (e.matches) {
                enableHighContrast();
              } else {
                disableHighContrast();
              }
            }
          });
        } catch (e) {}
        
        /**
         * Watch for Klaviyo input style changes and override them
         * This catches when Klaviyo dynamically updates inline styles
         */
        var klaviyoStyleObserver = null;
        function observeKlaviyoForms() {
          if (typeof MutationObserver === 'undefined' || !document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
            return;
          }
          
          // Create observer if it doesn't exist
          if (!klaviyoStyleObserver) {
            klaviyoStyleObserver = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
              mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
                if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'style') {
                  var target = mutation.target;
                  // Check if this is a Klaviyo form input
                  if (target.tagName === 'INPUT' && 
                      (target.type === 'email' || target.type === 'text') &&
                      (target.id && target.id.indexOf('email_') === 0 ||
                       target.classList.contains('needsclick') ||
                       target.closest('[data-testid="form-component"]') ||
                       target.closest('[data-testid="form-row"]'))) {
                    // Klaviyo changed the style - override it immediately
                    setTimeout(function() {
                      target.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');                      target.style.setProperty('text-decoration', 'none', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('border-color', '#000000', 'important');
                    }, 0);
                  }
                  // Check if this is a Klaviyo form label
                  if (target.tagName === 'LABEL' &&
                      (target.classList.contains('needsclick') ||
                       target.classList.contains('klaviyo-sr-only') ||
                       (target.id && target.id.indexOf('label-email') === 0) ||
                       target.closest('[data-testid="form-component"]'))) {
                    // Klaviyo changed the style - override it immediately
                    setTimeout(function() {
                      target.style.setProperty('color', '#000000', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('background-color', '#ffffff', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('background', '#ffffff', 'important');
                    }, 0);
                  }
                }
              });
            });
          }
          
          // Find all Klaviyo form elements and observe them
          var klaviyoInputs = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] input, [data-testid="form-row"] input, .klaviyo-form input, input.needsclick, input[id^="email_"]');
          var klaviyoLabels = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="form-component"] label, .klaviyo-form label, label.needsclick, label.klaviyo-sr-only, label[id^="label-email"], label[id^="label-"]');
          
          klaviyoInputs.forEach(function(input) {
            klaviyoStyleObserver.observe(input, {
              attributes: true,
              attributeFilter: ['style']
            });
          });
          
          klaviyoLabels.forEach(function(label) {
            klaviyoStyleObserver.observe(label, {
              attributes: true,
              attributeFilter: ['style']
            });
          });
          
          console.log('[High Contrast] Observing ' + klaviyoInputs.length + ' Klaviyo inputs and ' + klaviyoLabels.length + ' labels for style changes');
        }
        
        // Start observing after initial load
        if (document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
          setTimeout(observeKlaviyoForms, 1000);
          setTimeout(observeKlaviyoForms, 3000);
          setTimeout(observeKlaviyoForms, 5000);

        /**
         * Watch for empty cart button style changes and re-apply high contrast styles
         */
        var emptyCartObserver = null;
        function observeEmptyCartButton() {
          if (typeof MutationObserver === 'undefined' || !document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
            return;
          }
          
          if (!emptyCartObserver) {
            emptyCartObserver = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
              mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
                if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'style') {
                  var target = mutation.target;
                  if (target.classList && target.classList.contains('button_empty_cart')) {
                    setTimeout(function() {
                      target.style.setProperty('background-color', '#000000', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('background', '#000000', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('color', '#ffffff', 'important');
                      target.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');                      target.style.setProperty('text-decoration', 'none', 'important');
                    }, 0);
                  }
                }
              });
            });
          }
          
          document.querySelectorAll('.button_empty_cart').forEach(function(btn) {
            emptyCartObserver.observe(btn, {
              attributes: true,
              attributeFilter: ['style']
            });
            // Also re-apply styles immediately
            btn.style.setProperty('background-color', '#000000', 'important');
            btn.style.setProperty('background', '#000000', 'important');
            btn.style.setProperty('color', '#ffffff', 'important');
            btn.style.setProperty('border', '2px solid #000000', 'important');            btn.style.setProperty('text-decoration', 'none', 'important');
          });
        }
        
        // Start observing empty cart button after initial load
        if (document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
          setTimeout(observeEmptyCartButton, 500);
          setTimeout(observeEmptyCartButton, 1500);
          setTimeout(observeEmptyCartButton, 3000);
        }
        }
        
        // Re-attach handlers when new content is added (for mobile menu, etc.)
        if (typeof MutationObserver !== 'undefined') {
          var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
            var shouldReattach = false;
            var hasMegaMenu = false;
            var hasKlaviyoForm = false;
            
            mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
              if (mutation.addedNodes.length > 0) {
                mutation.addedNodes.forEach(function(node) {
                  if (node.nodeType === 1) {
                    if (node.classList && node.classList.contains('js-high-contrast-toggle')) {
                      shouldReattach = true;
                    }
                    if (node.querySelector && node.querySelector('.js-high-contrast-toggle')) {
                      shouldReattach = true;
                    }
                    // Check if mega menu was added
                    if (node.classList && (node.classList.contains('mega-menu__content') || 
                        node.classList.contains('mega-menu__list') || 
                        node.classList.contains('mega-menu__link'))) {
                      hasMegaMenu = true;
                    }
                    if (node.querySelector && node.querySelector('.mega-menu__content, .mega-menu__list, .mega-menu__link')) {
                      hasMegaMenu = true;
                    }
                    // Check if Klaviyo form was added
                    if (node.getAttribute && (node.getAttribute('data-testid') === 'form-component' || 
                        node.getAttribute('data-testid') === 'form-row' ||
                        node.classList && node.classList.contains('klaviyo-form'))) {
                      hasKlaviyoForm = true;
                    }
                    if (node.querySelector && node.querySelector('[data-testid="form-component"], [data-testid="form-row"], .klaviyo-form')) {
                      hasKlaviyoForm = true;
                    }
                  }
                });
              }
            });
            
            if (shouldReattach) {
              console.log('[High Contrast] New toggle button detected, reattaching handlers');
              attachHandlers();
            }
            
            // Clean mega menu styles if mega menu was added and high contrast is active
            if (hasMegaMenu && document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
              setTimeout(function() {
                cleanMegaMenuStyles();
              }, 100);
            }
            
            // Apply styles to Klaviyo forms if they were added and high contrast is active
            if (hasKlaviyoForm && document.documentElement.classList.contains(BODY_CLASS)) {
              setTimeout(function() {
                fixKlaviyoForms();
                // Re-observe the new forms to catch style changes
                observeKlaviyoForms();
                console.log('[High Contrast] Applied styles to dynamically loaded Klaviyo form');
              }, 100);
            }
          });
          
          observer.observe(document.body, {
            childList: true,
            subtree: true
          });
        }
        
        console.log('[High Contrast] Initialization complete');
      }
      
      // Expose to global scope for debugging
      window.POTHighContrast = {
        enable: enableHighContrast,
        disable: disableHighContrast,
        toggle: toggleHighContrast,
        markElements: markOrangeElements,
        applyStyles: applyHighContrastStyles,
        removeStyles: removeHighContrastStyles,
        attachHandlers: attachHandlers
      };
      
      // Initialize when DOM is ready
      if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        console.log('[High Contrast] Waiting for DOM...');
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initHighContrastToggle);
      } else {
        console.log('[High Contrast] DOM ready, initializing now');
        initHighContrastToggle();
      }
    })();
  } else {
    console.log('[High Contrast] Script already loaded, skipping duplicate');
    // Still attach handlers to any new buttons
    if (window.POTHighContrast && window.POTHighContrast.attachHandlers) {
      setTimeout(function() {
        window.POTHighContrast.attachHandlers();
      }, 100);
    }
  }
</script>

    <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12C2 17.52 6.48 22 12 22V2Z" fill="currentColor"/>

  /* High Contrast Toggle Button Styles */
  .high-contrast-toggle {

    padding: 1rem;
    background: transparent;
    border: 2px solid transparent;
    border-radius: 50%;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    color: currentColor;
  }

  .high-contrast-toggle:hover {
    background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  }

  /* Focus styles - critical for keyboard accessibility */
  .high-contrast-toggle:focus {
    outline: none;
  }

  .high-contrast-toggle:focus-visible {
    outline: 3px solid #005fcc;
    outline-offset: 2px;
    border-color: transparent;
  }

  /* Fallback for browsers that don't support :focus-visible */
  .high-contrast-toggle:focus:not(:focus-visible) {
    outline: none;
  }

  .high-contrast-toggle__icon {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

    width: 2.4rem;
    height: 2.4rem;

  .nav-accessibility-controls .high-contrast-toggle {
    margin-right: 1rem;

  /* Active state indicator */

<script>
  // Only run this script once (guard against multiple includes)
  if (!window._POTHighContrastInitialized) {
    window._POTHighContrastInitialized = true;
    
    (function() {
      'use strict';
      
      var STORAGE_KEY = 'pot-high-contrast-mode';
      var BODY_CLASS = 'high-contrast-mode';
      var URL_PARAMS = ['high-contrast', 'hc', 'highcontrast', 'contrast'];
      
      // Orange color values to detect (the brand orange #ff4713)
      var ORANGE_COLORS = [
        'rgb(255, 71, 19)',
        'rgb(255,71,19)',
        '#ff4713',
        '#FF4713',
        'rgba(255, 71, 19',
        'rgba(255,71,19'
      ];
      
      console.log('[High Contrast] Script loaded');
      
      /**
       * Check if a color string matches the orange brand color
       */
      function isOrangeColor(colorStr) {
        if (!colorStr) return false;
        var normalized = colorStr.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g, '');
        return ORANGE_COLORS.some(function(orange) {
          return normalized.indexOf(orange.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g, '')) !== -1;
        });
      }
      
      /**
       * Find and mark all elements with orange colors (background, text, border, SVG fill)
       */
      function markOrangeElements() {
        var allElements = document.querySelectorAll('*');
        var count = 0;
        
        allElements.forEach(function(el) {
          try {
            // Skip mega menu elements - they should maintain their original colors
            if (el.closest('.mega-menu__content') || 
                el.closest('.mega-menu__list') || 
                el.closest('.mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__content') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__list') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__link') ||
                el.classList.contains('mega-menu__sub-menu') ||
                el.closest('.znt-mega-menu-panel')) {
              return; // Skip this element
            }
            // Skip footer – footer uses CSS-only high-contrast rules so it reverts cleanly when toggle is off
            if (el.closest('footer.footer') || el.closest('.shopify-section-footer')) {
              return;
            }
            
            var inlineStyle = el.getAttribute('style') || '';
            var computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(el);
            var bgColor = computedStyle.backgroundColor;
            var textColor = computedStyle.color;
            var borderColor = computedStyle.borderColor;
            
            // Check background color
            if (isOrangeColor(inlineStyle) || isOrangeColor(bgColor)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-bg')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-bg', bgColor || inlineStyle);
                count++;
              }
            }
            
            // Check text color
            if (isOrangeColor(textColor)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-color')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-color', textColor);
                count++;
              }
            }
            
            // Check border color
            if (isOrangeColor(borderColor)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-border')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-border', borderColor);
                count++;
              }
            }
          } catch (e) {}
        });
        
        // Also mark SVG elements with orange fill (skip footer – footer icons use CSS-only rules)
        var svgElements = document.querySelectorAll('svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon');
        svgElements.forEach(function(el) {
          try {
            if (el.closest('footer.footer') || el.closest('.shopify-section-footer')) return;
            var fill = el.getAttribute('fill') || '';
            if (isOrangeColor(fill)) {
              if (!el.hasAttribute('data-hc-original-fill')) {
                el.setAttribute('data-hc-original-fill', fill);
                count++;
              }
            }
          } catch (e) {}
        });
        
        if (count > 0) {
          console.log('[High Contrast] Marked ' + count + ' orange elements');
        }
      }
      
      /**
       * Check URL parameters for high contrast flag
       */
      function checkURLParams() {
        try {
          var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
          
          for (var i = 0; i < URL_PARAMS.length; i++) {
            var param = URL_PARAMS[i];
            var value = urlParams.get(param);
            if (value === 'true' || value === '1' || value === 'on' || value === '') {
              console.log('[High Contrast] URL parameter detected: ' + param);
              return true;
            }
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.log('[High Contrast] Error checking URL params:', e);
        }
        return false;
      }
      
      /**
       * Remove any inline styles from mega menu elements
       * This ensures mega menu maintains its original appearance
       */
      function cleanMegaMenuStyles() {
        var megaMenuSelectors = [
          '.mega-menu__content',
          '.mega-menu__list',
          '.mega-menu__link',
          '.mega-menu__sub-menu',
          '.znt-mega-menu-panel',
          '.znt-submenu-button'
        ];
        
        megaMenuSelectors.forEach(function(selector) {
          document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(function(el) {
            // Remove inline style properties that might be set by high contrast
            el.style.removeProperty('background-color');
            el.style.removeProperty('background');
            el.style.removeProperty('color');
            el.style.removeProperty('border-color');
            el.style.removeProperty('border');
            // Also remove from all children
            el.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(function(child) {
              child.style.removeProperty('background-color');
              child.style.removeProperty('background');
              child.style.removeProperty('color');
              child.style.removeProperty('border-color');
              child.style.removeProperty('border');
            });
          });
        });
        
        // Remove data attributes from mega menu elements
        document.querySelectorAll('.mega-menu__content [data-hc-original-bg], .mega-menu__content [data-hc-original-color], .mega-menu__content [data-hc-original-border]').forEach(function(el) {
          el.removeAttribute('data-hc-original-bg');
          el.removeAttribute('data-hc-original-color');
          el.removeAttribute('data-hc-original-border');
        });
      }
      
      /**
       * Enable high contrast mode
       */
      function enableHighContrast() {
        console.log('[High Contrast] Enabling...');
        
        document.documentElement.classList.add(BODY_CLASS);
        if (document.body) {
          document.body.classList.add(BODY_CLASS);
        }
        
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, 'true');
        } catch (e) {}
        
        // Mark orange elements
        markOrangeElements();
        
        // Directly modify inline styles for elements with orange backgrounds
        applyHighContrastStyles();
        
        // Clean up any styles that might have been applied to mega menu
        cleanMegaMenuStyles();
        
        // Fix Klaviyo forms
        fixKlaviyoForms();
        
        // Start observing Klaviyo forms for style changes
        setTimeout(observeKlaviyoForms, 500);
        setTimeout(observeKlaviyoForms, 1500);
        
        // Update all toggles on page
        document.querySelectorAll('.js-high-contrast-toggle').forEach(function(t) {
          t.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
        });
        
        // Announce to screen readers
        announceToScreenReader('High contrast mode enabled');
        
        console.log('[High Contrast] Mode ENABLED');
      }
